item:
Concept: “bird”
Statement: Every bird is an animal. Normally a bird can fly.

Concept: “triangle”
Statement: Every triangle has exactly three sides. Normally a triangle has four corners.

Concept: “chair”
Statement: In every case of a chair, it is made to be sat on. Normally a chair has legs.

Concept: “knife”
Statement: Every knife is made of metal. Normally a knife can cut.

Concept: “letter (written message)”
Statement: In every case of a letter, someone wrote it. Typically it is meant for someone to read.

Concept: “gift”
Statement: In every case of a gift, someone gives it. Typically the one who receives it must pay the giver for it.
